title: bind security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[32:9.16.23-34.0.1.1]
- Fix warning when changing device file permissions [Orabug: 36518580]

[32:9.16.23-34.1]
- Prevent cache poisoning due to weak PRNG (CVE-2025-40780)
- Replace downstream fixes with upstream changes
- Address various spoofing attacks (CVE-2025-40778)

[32:9.16.23-34]
- Fix failures in idna system test (RHEL-66172)

[32:9.16.23-33]
- logrotate: skip if empty and remove old variants (RHEL-113942)

[32:9.16.23-32]
- Decode IDN names on input in all situations in utilities (RHEL-66172)
full_text:
[32:9.16.23-34.0.1.1]
- Fix warning when changing device file permissions [Orabug: 36518580]

[32:9.16.23-34.1]
- Prevent cache poisoning due to weak PRNG (CVE-2025-40780)
- Replace downstream fixes with upstream changes
- Address various spoofing attacks (CVE-2025-40778)

[32:9.16.23-34]
- Fix failures in idna system test (RHEL-66172)

[32:9.16.23-33]
- logrotate: skip if empty and remove old variants (RHEL-113942)

[32:9.16.23-32]
- Decode IDN names on input in all situations in utilities (RHEL-66172)

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-21110.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-40778.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-40780.html
